pipeline_mode.meta_agent_note: Standard adaptive pipeline — cross-cutting feature benefits from all phases

jit.enabled.meta_agent_note: JIT disabled — all target files are well-identified, no need for dynamic tool loading

replanning.enabled.meta_agent_note: Replanning disabled — task is well-specified with 6 explicit items, low ambiguity. Reference implementation exists. Divergence unlikely.

fast_track.enabled.meta_agent_note: Not fast-tracked despite high confidence (0.94) — cross-cutting nature (3 skills + docs + schema + config) benefits from structured phases for consistency verification

routing.enabled.meta_agent_note: No template routing — custom task, unique to this codebase

verification.dimension_weights.meta_agent_note: Security weight reduced from 0.3 to 0.1 (pure markdown plugin, no runtime code, no credentials). Correctness and robustness weights increased — cross-skill consistency is the primary risk. Spec alignment increased — 6 explicit user requirements must all be met.

skip_phases.meta_agent_note: No phases skipped — all phases valuable for this cross-cutting change

approval_gates.meta_agent_note: Standard gates at spec (3), TDD (4), and plan (6)

tdd.mutation_threshold.meta_agent_note: Default threshold — tests are structural grep-based checks on markdown files
